title: Segfault when inserting into table with generated columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 Int32, c1 String, c2 Int32 MATERIALIZED (c0 + 1), c3 Int32 MATERIALIZED (if(isNull(c1), 0, length(c1))), c4 String NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 Int32, c1 Float64, c2 String DEFAULT 'default', c3 Float64 MATERIALIZED (c1 * 2), c4 Float64 CHECK(c4 > 0));
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c3 > 0 OR isNull(c1);
key_bug_features: Segfault on insert into table with generated columns
